title: PacBio long-read sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9plu5","text":"The barcoded library is also sequenced via PacBio long-read sequencing to associate variants with particular barcodes. This allows for the generation of a variant-barcode map along the length of the protein of interest, to which variant scores can be mapped.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: For each library subtile, digest a total of 3 µg with AflII in reactions as follows: %s %s
Sequence the prepared libraries on a PacBio Revio.
Prepare the SMRTbell library using the SMRTbell prep kit 3.0 according to the manufacturer’s protocol.
Check DNA quantity using Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kit, following the manufacturer’s protocol.
Purify the library subtitles using AMPure PB beads, following the manufacturer’s protocol.
Digest the library subtiles for 04:00:00 at 37 °C , followed by heat activation at 65 °C for 00:20:00 .
creator: Sarah Heidl
